detail.description: Santiago Espinal homers (1) on a fly ball to left center field.
Santiago Espinal singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Mike Yastrzemski. Santiago Espinal out at 2nd on the throw, right fielder Mike Yastrzemski to shortstop Jim Jarvis.
Santiago Espinal doubles (2) on a line drive to left fielder Michael Conforto.
Santiago Espinal doubles (1) on a line drive to left fielder Ezequiel Duran.
Santiago Espinal singles on a line drive to center fielder Jake Mangum. Dalton Rushing to 3rd. Miguel Rojas to 2nd.
Santiago Espinal singles on a ground ball to right fielder Ryan O'Hearn. Miguel Rojas to 2nd.
Santiago Espinal singles on a line drive to left fielder Bryan Reynolds.
Santiago Espinal singles on a line drive to left fielder Jordan Beck.
Santiago Espinal singles on a line drive to left fielder Jordan Beck. Max Muncy to 3rd. Miguel Rojas to 2nd.
Santiago Espinal singles on a ground ball to center fielder Tristan Peters.
Santiago Espinal singles on a line drive to left fielder Sam Antonacci. Kyle Tucker scores. Miguel Rojas scores. Max Muncy to 2nd.
Santiago Espinal doubles (3) on a line drive to center fielder Blake Perkins. Teoscar Hernández scores. Miguel Rojas to 3rd.
Santiago Espinal singles on a fly ball to right fielder Jo Adell. Shohei Ohtani to 3rd.
Santiago Espinal singles on a ground ball to left fielder Tommy Troy.
Santiago Espinal singles on a line drive to center fielder Joey Wiemer. Freddie Freeman scores. Andy Pages scores. Alex Call to 2nd.
